UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: User profile schema with professional skills, social connections, and custom branding.

uid.description: Unique user ID of the profile owner matching their auth UID.

username.description: Cyberpunk handle/username chosen by the user.

displayName.description: The user's real or professional public name.

bio.description: Short summary or bio of the user.

avatarUrl.description: URL of the user's uploaded or custom avatar image.

bannerUrl.description: URL of the user's customizable banner image.

skills.description: List of specialized technical or creative skills.

socials.description: Handles or URLs for various networks.

updatedAt.description: ISO timestamp or Firestore server timestamp when the profile was last modified.

/profiles/{profileId}.description: Stores cyber-identity profiles synced by user ID.
